failure_modes.cause: BPR set at 5.0 bar, below required 41.5 bar
failure_modes.mitigation: Upgrade BPR to handle at least 42 bar

failure_modes.cause: Vapour pressure of TBAB/EG solvent exceeds pump inlet pressure at T = 120°C
failure_modes.mitigation: Pressurise feed reservoir to 0.5 bar above vapour pressure

failure_modes.cause: Prolonged exposure to 120°C may degrade TBAB/EG
failure_modes.mitigation: Limit residence time at high temperature

single_points_of_failure: BPR valve — blockage stops all flow
validation_experiments: Run system at Q=3.81543 mL/min with upgraded BPR for 60 min; monitor pressure stability
Conduct thermal stability test on TBAB/EG solvent at 120°C for 2 hours
Run blank solvent at Q=0.5 mL/min for 60 min; monitor pressure for drift > 5%
